languages.text: {n}Ярость переполняет вас, выплескиваясь наружу сдавленным рыком. Вы будто наблюдаете со стороны, как, шагнув вперед, бьете пилота по окровавленному лицу. Слуга династии бросает на вас исполненный лютой злобы взгляд, и кажется, что еще мгновение — и он даст сдачи.{/n}

{n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ярость переполняет вас, выплескиваясь наружу сдавленным рыком. Вы будто наблюдаете со стороны, как, шагнув вперед, бьете пилота по окровавленному лицу. Слуга династии бросает на вас исполненный лютой злобы взгляд, и кажется, что еще мгновение — и он даст сдачи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Fury spills out of you in a strangled roar. As if watching a stranger, you see yourself step toward the pilot and strike across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such feral spite that it seems he might actually strike back.{/n}

{n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}
{n}Rage overwhelms you and takes over — you step forward and punch the pilot in his bleeding face. His face contorts with anger and he seems on the verge of striking back at you.{/n}

{n}Fury spills out of you in a strangled roar. As if watching a stranger, you see yourself step toward the pilot and strike across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such feral spite that it seems he might actually strike back.{/n}

{n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}

languages.text: {n}怒りに呑まれ、一歩踏み出して操縦士の血に濡れた顔面に拳を叩き込む。彼の顔は怒りで歪み、今にも殴り返してきそうだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Rage overwhelms you and takes over — you step forward and punch the pilot in his bleeding face. His face contorts with anger and he seems on the verge of striking back at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}怒りに呑まれ、一歩踏み出して操縦士の血に濡れた顔面に拳を叩き込む。彼の顔は怒りで歪み、今にも殴り返してきそうだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La fureur jaillit de votre gorge sous la forme d'un rugissement étranglé. Vous avez le sentiment d'être face à un étranger alors que vous vous approchez du pilote avant de frapper violemment son visage ensanglanté. Cet humble serviteur de la dynastie vous adresse alors un regard si haineux qu'il semble à deux doigts de vous rendre la pareille.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La fureur jaillit de votre gorge sous la forme d'un rugissement étranglé. Vous avez le sentiment d'être face à un étranger alors que vous vous approchez du pilote avant de frapper violemment son visage ensanglanté. Cet humble serviteur de la dynastie vous adresse alors un regard si haineux qu'il semble à deux doigts de vous rendre la pareille.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Öfken, boğuk bir kükremeyle içinden patlıyor. Pilota doğru adım atıp kanlar içindeki suratına vururken bir yabancıyı izliyormuş gibi hissediyorsun. Hanedanlığın hizmetkârı, gözlerinin içine öyle şiddetli bir kinle bakıyor ki sanki sana karşılık verecekmiş gibi duruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Öfken, boğuk bir kükremeyle içinden patlıyor. Pilota doğru adım atıp kanlar içindeki suratına vururken bir yabancıyı izliyormuş gibi hissediyorsun. Hanedanlığın hizmetkârı, gözlerinin içine öyle şiddetli bir kinle bakıyor ki sanki sana karşılık verecekmiş gibi duruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Wut bricht mit einem erstickten Schrei aus dir hervor. Du hast das Gefühl, {mf|einen Fremden|eine Fremde} zu beobachten, als du auf den Piloten zugehst und ihm in sein blutiges Gesicht schlägst. In den Augen des Dieners der Dynastie funkelt ein derart abgrundtiefer Bosheit, dass du befürchtest, er könnte zurückschlagen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Wut bricht mit einem erstickten Schrei aus dir hervor. Du hast das Gefühl, {mf|einen Fremden|eine Fremde} zu beobachten, als du auf den Piloten zugehst und ihm in sein blutiges Gesicht schlägst. In den Augen des Dieners der Dynastie funkelt ein derart abgrundtiefer Bosheit, dass du befürchtest, er könnte zurückschlagen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La furia brota de tu interior con un rugido entrecortado. Sintiendo como si lo vieras todo desde fuera, das un paso hacia el piloto y golpeas su rostro ensangrentado. El siervo de la dinastía te lanza una mirada tan cargada de odio que casi parece a punto de devolverte el golpe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La furia brota de tu interior con un rugido entrecortado. Sintiendo como si lo vieras todo desde fuera, das un paso hacia el piloto y golpeas su rostro ensangrentado. El siervo de la dinastía te lanza una mirada tan cargada de odio que casi parece a punto de devolverte el golpe.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那怒火化作一声嘶哑的咆哮，从你口中迸发出来。你感觉自己像个旁观者，看着自己走向飞行员，一巴掌狠狠扇在他那血迹斑斑的脸上。那位王朝的仆从恶狠狠地瞪着你，眼神里满是怨毒，似乎马上就要出手反击。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury bursts out of you in a strangled roar. You feel you are watching a stranger as you step toward the pilot and strike him across his bloodied face. The servant of the dynasty meets your eyes with such fierce spite that it seems he might actually strike you back.{/n}
